howItWorks.title: Share the story
howItWorks.desc: Add the recipient's name, occasion, profession, relationship, interests, reference image, and the small emotional details that should show up in the keepsake.

howItWorks.title: Review the concept
howItWorks.desc: Receive a polished design direction with pose, mood, palette, base style, and gifting intent before anything moves into production.

howItWorks.title: Approve every detail
howItWorks.desc: Confirm size, finish, color language, packaging, engraving, and revision notes through a clear approval workflow.

howItWorks.title: Craft, pack, support
howItWorks.desc: After approval, the piece moves through production care, protective gift packaging, dispatch updates, and support if anything needs attention.

categories.name: Career Milestone Figurines
categories.desc: Doctor, founder, chef, teacher, artist, athlete, or corporate farewell pieces with signature props.

categories.name: Family & Couple Keepsakes
categories.desc: Warm story-backed gifts for parents, partners, siblings, weddings, anniversaries, and birthdays.

categories.name: Pet & Tribute Pieces
categories.desc: Sensitive keepsakes for beloved pets, special people, or moments that deserve a lasting form.

categories.name: Seasonal Gift Drops
categories.desc: Curated seasonal collections for Diwali, New Year, housewarmings, weddings, and team celebrations.

testimonials.name: Megha A.
testimonials.quote: The design review caught the exact stethoscope detail we wanted, and the gift box arrived ready to hand over.

testimonials.name: Varun P.
testimonials.quote: The approval step made me comfortable ordering a custom piece. The final figurine matched the profession, outfit, and inside joke we shared.

testimonials.name: Ankit & Rhea
testimonials.quote: Our anniversary keepsake came with careful finishing and packaging, so it felt like a planned premium gift instead of a last-minute custom order.

faq.q: How does the approval workflow work?
faq.a: You share the story first, review a concept direction, request changes if needed, and approve the final details before the keepsake moves into production.
Concept previews set the pose, mood, styling, and personalization direction. Final production includes human design review and practical adjustments for a durable finished piece.
Yes. The customization flow collects notes for outfit details, props, engraving, packaging, and contact preferences so revisions can be handled before approval.

faq.q: How is the gift packed and supported?
faq.a: Each order is checked for finish quality, secured in presentation-ready packaging, and supported with dispatch updates plus follow-up help if anything arrives unexpectedly.
